title: Silky Vietnamese Ladyfingers Cha Gio
description: A romantic Vietnamese dish featuring savoiardi ladyfingers, double rise bread, and herbal flavors, served in a cataplana vessel.

ingredients.name: herbs
ingredients.notes: chopped, such as cilantro and basil

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and saute until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the marinated and chopped tofu, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked mushroom mixture, chopped herbs, salt, and pepper.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs and a pinch of salt.
Dip each ladyfinger into the egg mixture, coating both sides, then roll in the bread cubes to coat.
Place the coated ladyfingers in the cataplana vessel, and spoon the mushroom mixture alongside.
Cover the vessel with a lid, and bake for 25 minutes.
